name: soulvest-card-generator
description: SoulVest Greeting Card Generator - Android wrapper via Capacitor

scripts.android:assets: npm run prepare:assets && npx capacitor-assets generate --android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add android
scripts.android:init: npm run cap:add:android && npm run cap:sync
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:apk: npm run android:precheck && npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:aab: npm run android:precheck && npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
